input_dict.question: Which town was the director of the "Red Curtain Trilogy" born in?
input_dict.target_summary:
First-hop claim: "Sydney, New South Wales, Australia".
Supporting second-hop facts: Mark Anthony "Baz" Luhrmann (born 17 September 1962) is an Australian film director, screenwriter and producer best known for the "Red Curtain Trilogy". Herons Creek is a small township on the North Coast of New South Wales, Australia (coordinates 31°35′S 152°44′E). Film director Baz Luhrmann was raised in Herons Creek.
